input.prompt:
Locked overhead camera, top-down view of a closed sketchbook on a warm wooden desk. The cover has the title 'Adi, in Drawings' on it.

Action: The cover of the sketchbook gently lifts and rotates open, hinging on the spine on the left side. As the cover swings open it reveals the inside two-page spread: a photograph is already taped to the inside left page (with small pieces of cream-colored masking tape on the corners), and the right page is blank cream paper. The book settles flat into the open position by the end of the clip.

Lighting: warm soft directional light from upper-left throughout, gentle natural shadows.

Constraints: locked overhead camera (no pan, no zoom, no tilt). No hand or person visible — the cover lifts on its own. The photograph on the inside left page is the same as in the end frame — do not modify it. The title text on the cover should remain readable until the cover rotates out of view. Single continuous take, no cuts.
